title: oncoba africana
intro: Oncoba africana, also known as the African mangrove or water berry, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oncoba africana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, including those of the skin and respiratory system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including diarrhea, malaria, and wounds.
